title: About
body:
About GitCMS

GitCMS is a headless content management system that uses GitHub repositories as its storage backend.

Built with:

  • Next.js & TypeScript
  • GitHub OAuth for authentication
  • Octokit for GitHub API integration
  • TipTap for rich text editing
  • Tailwind CSS for styling

Your content, version controlled.
excerpt: Learn about GitCMS and how it works
author: aniJani
